pattern: At time t the suffix word[t*k:] must match a prefix of the original; iterate t=1,2,... until the remaining suffix is a prefix or is empty (empty trivially allows any fill).
hints: After t operations the first t*k characters have been removed and replaced; the remaining original suffix is word[t*k:].
The word can revert at time t if and only if word[t*k:] is a prefix of word (since we can freely choose the t*k appended characters to be word[len(word)-t*k:]).
Try t=1,2,... and for each check whether word[t*k:] matches word[:len(word)-t*k]; as soon as t*k >= len(word) the suffix is empty and any fill works.

edge_inputs.description: k equals length, always reverts in 1
no overlap possible until string is fully consumed

stress.description: random lowercase strings of length up to 50
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    word = ''.join(rng.choice('abc') for _ in range(n))
    k = rng.randint(1, n)
    return [word, k]
